  spokesperson, important personnel (CEO, COO, CMO, CSO, etc.)

(2) Board Secretary: Hui-Chuan Hsieh/ Board Secretary of Chang Hua

records.subject: Announcement on behalf of our subsidiary bank in China, for the appointment of a new Executive Vice President.

spokesperson, acting
  spokesperson, important personnel (CEO, COO, CMO, CSO, etc.)
,financial officer, accounting officer, corporate governance officer,
chief information security officer, research and development officer,

Yu-Chi Hou, Senior Vice President & Division Head of Financial Management
Division of Chang Hua Commercial Bank, Ltd.
records.narrative_en:
Chang Hwa Bank has appointed Yu-Chi Hou, Senior Vice President & Division Head of Financial Management
Division of Chang Hua Commercial Bank, Ltd. as its new spokesperson, acting
  spokesperson, important personnel (CEO, COO, CMO, CSO, etc.)
,financial officer, accounting officer, corporate governance officer,
chief information security officer, research and development officer,
chief internal auditor, or designated and non-designated representatives):
